comment: Fix setup-time snapshot reactivity in useNetwork, useProvider, useConnect, useAccount and useWalletRequest; clear stale manager error on connect; optional paymaster on chains without AVNU; a failed connect keeps the previous wallet's change listener registered. Breaking: useNetwork().chain, useProvider().provider/paymasterProvider and useConnect().connector/pendingConnector are now ComputedRef values (use .value in script setup).
